message:
fix(cx): audit registry.rs + cx.rs — 3 bugs fixed

registry.rs (3431L):
- MEDIUM: register_with_policy Replace collision used separate lookup
  instead of was_active flag, causing redundant clone and less clear logic
- LOW: NamePermit::commit() unnecessarily cloned name when self is consumed

cx.rs (3123L):
- MEDIUM: scope_with_budget did not clamp child budget to parent constraints,
  allowing child scopes to escape parent deadline/poll_quota/cost_quota limits
- Added warn! log for verify_capability no-macaroon rejection path

63 registry tests + 50 cx tests pass. Clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
